character_concepts: Kip, a small friendly open-weight coding robot: rounded matte-white body, a glowing open-padlock icon on his chest (open weights, free to own), a tiny badge reading K3, big expressive eyes and plucky underdog energy.
Vault, a stiff chrome rent-by-the-token flagship robot: mirror-polished armor, a coin slot on his chest, a meter on his arm that ticks up, permanently smug expression.
Bao, a cheerful anthropomorphic download arrow mascot: bouncy green arrow body with stubby arms, a little price tag flipping to zero, springy and eager.

clips.concept_title: The old rule: rent the best
clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Kip the small open-weight coding robot stands at the foot of a tall glowing leaderboard staircase in a cozy dim server room, gazing up at expensive locked flagship robots on the pricey top steps behind a coin-operated turnstile, warm rim lighting, hopeful underdog expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic depth. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in from Kip's feet up to his face -> he looks up the towering pay-to-enter leaderboard and gulps -> Voice (soft, curious): the best coding model always cost a fortune to rent. -> SFX: low server hum, a single coin clink.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Kip the open-weight coding robot lights up as a giant zero-dollar free-download tag pops beside him and he leaps several steps up the glowing leaderboard staircase, the open padlock on his chest shining, a confetti burst of tiny download arrows, bright energetic lighting, awe on his face, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic detail. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Quick tilt up following Kip as he jumps -> a free zero-cost tag snaps open and he bounds up past the locked flagship robots -> Voice (delighted, rising): free to download, and it just beat them. -> SFX: bright chime, whoosh, popping confetti.

clips.concept_title: Own it on your own machine
clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Kip the open-weight coding robot sits happily on an indie builder's laptop keyboard in a warm home office, no meter ticking anywhere, a small honest asterisk sign floating gently beside him, cozy desk-lamp glow, contented confident expression, warm cinematic lighting, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow orbit around Kip perched on the laptop -> he settles in to work while a small honest asterisk drifts up beside him -> Voice (warm, honest): now you can run it yourself, just remember a benchmark is not your real code. -> SFX: soft keyboard clicks, gentle lamp buzz.

Aspect Ratio 9:16.

Pixar-style 3D animation. Kip the open-weight coding robot triumphantly holding up a giant zero-dollar free tag beside a glowing leaderboard, wide delighted grin, dynamic low hero angle, warm rim lighting, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
